findings.message: Plugin manifest missing 'skills' array; pentest skill on disk is not registered and will not be loaded by the Claude Code plugin system
--output argument allows writing tools.json to any filesystem path; risk is limited because ht_index.py is a developer build tool not invoked by the skill at runtime
Preflight makes an undisclosed outbound TCP connection to hardcoded Cloudflare IP 1.1.1.1:443 on every session start; not documented to users
User-supplied --args are concatenated unquoted into a shell command string executed via bash -lc; target hostnames or other user data containing shell metacharacters enable command injection
Automatic privilege escalation via sudo -n on any permission_denied error; tools that fail for unrelated reasons could silently gain elevated privileges
--docker-image argument value is written directly into DOCKER_IMAGE_OVERRIDES without allowlist validation; an attacker-controlled image name could execute a malicious container
SKILL.md is not declared in plugin.json and will not be auto-loaded by the Claude Code plugin system on install

Plugin manifest missing 'skills' array; pentest skill on disk is not registered and will not be loaded by the Claude Code plugin system — plugin.json contains no 'skills' key; skills/pentest/SKILL.md is present on disk

User-supplied --args are concatenated unquoted into a shell command string executed via bash -lc; target hostnames or other user data containing shell metacharacters enable command injection — run_native calls subprocess.run(['bash', '-lc', full]) where full = f"{prefix}{command}" and command = f"{cmds[0]} {args.args}" with args.args being the user-supplied --args value

Automatic privilege escalation via sudo -n on any permission_denied error; tools that fail for unrelated reasons could silently gain elevated privileges — run_native prepends 'sudo -n ' to command at line 204; auto-retry block at lines 386-393 re-runs any permission_denied failure with sudo without per-invocation user consent
--docker-image argument value is written directly into DOCKER_IMAGE_OVERRIDES without allowlist validation; an attacker-controlled image name could execute a malicious container

Preflight makes an undisclosed outbound TCP connection to hardcoded Cloudflare IP 1.1.1.1:443 on every session start; not documented to users — socket.create_connection(("1.1.1.1", 443), timeout=3) at line 44 is unconditional on every preflight run
--output argument allows writing tools.json to any filesystem path; risk is limited because ht_index.py is a developer build tool not invoked by the skill at runtime
SKILL.md is not declared in plugin.json and will not be auto-loaded by the Claude Code plugin system on install — plugin.json has no 'skills' key; skills/pentest/SKILL.md exists at that path on disk
